title: Christmas Day
description: A Christian celebration of the birth of Jesus Christ.

title: Easter Sunday
description: A Christian celebration of the resurrection of Jesus Christ.

title: Eid al-Fitr
description: A Muslim celebration marking the end of Ramadan.

title: Eid al-Adha
description: A Muslim festival of sacrifice observed during Hajj.

title: Rosh Hashanah
description: The Jewish New Year, a time of reflection and prayer.

title: Yom Kippur
description: The Jewish Day of Atonement, centered on repentance and fasting.

title: Vesak
description: A Buddhist observance honoring the birth, enlightenment and passing of the Buddha.

title: Asalha Puja
description: A Theravada Buddhist festival remembering the Buddha's first sermon.

title: Diwali
description: A Hindu festival of lights celebrating the victory of light over darkness.

title: Holi
description: A Hindu spring festival celebrating color, renewal and devotion.

title: Guru Nanak Gurpurab
description: A Sikh celebration of the birth of Guru Nanak, the first Sikh Guru.

title: Vaisakhi
description: A Sikh festival commemorating the formation of the Khalsa.

title: Naw-Ruz
description: The Bahai New Year, observed at the spring equinox.

title: Ridvan
description: A Bahai festival commemorating Baha'u'llah's declaration in the Garden of Ridvan.
